input_summary: Sample fixture for Analyst Assurance Desk: a bounded case, claim, source, or decision problem requiring the instrument to produce a traceable output.
evidence_or_constraint: This sample requires explicit source, uncertainty, or method constraint handling before any public claim is strengthened.
reviewer_standard: The output must state what the human analyst changed, constrained, rejected, or preserved.

generated_result.working_judgment: The instrument processed the submitted material through Claim audit and produced a bounded operational record.
generated_result.mechanism_trace: Human-AI analysis assurance desk -> Claim audit -> Human-AI delta record
generated_result.next_required_evidence: Capture browser screenshot and repeat against a second non-sample fixture before stronger claims.
generated_result.claim_boundary: Executed sample trace for a local runtime slice; not multi-user deployment, external validation, or full project completion.

acceptance_checks.name: review standard present
acceptance_checks.evidence: The output must state what the human analyst changed, constrained, rejected, or preserved.

acceptance_checks.name: exportable trace
acceptance_checks.evidence: record captured as JSON trace file
